summary: Added five user-facing CHANGELOG.md entries covering Phase 2 tasks 8–13: heartbeat error dedup (T8), removal of duplicate selectionOverlay (T9), contextual empty-preview messaging (T10), aria-pressed on segmented buttons (T11), and :focus-visible focus rings (T12). T13 was a docs-only task and is reflected by these CHANGELOG additions; no other docs files needed updates. Changes committed as d54a265.
